arts.ttl: Kyle Vassell states who is more difficult to face - Celtic's Auston Trusty or Liam Scales
arts.sum: The 31-year-old told Open Goal that Scales is ‘a little bit smarter’ and he likes the challenge of Trusty because he prefers being more physical. It wasn’t a great game for the American, but his fellow centre-back didn’t exactly showcase anything better during that Ibrox horror show after the New Year, so what is it like facing the duo?

arts.ttl: Ally McCoist called 'salty' as Alan Brazil and Shebahn Aherne defend Celtic in Champions League
arts.sum: And Celtic-mad Alan Brazil feels it makes that trip down south ‘harder’ because Villa won’t rest players now knowing that they need a win, as he told talkSPORT (22/01/25 at 7:50 am). Aherne labelled McCoist ‘salty’ because Celtic are in Europe’s elite competition, whilst Brazil reminded his fellow countryman of what trophy sits in the Parkhead cabinet room that Rangers will never win.

arts.ttl: Celtic need to hurry as rivals ready to ‘meet the price’ and seal signing
arts.sum: There’s a claim in the Turkish media that Fenerbahce are considering an offer for Hammarby attacker Bazoumana Touré, who has also been linked with Celtic in recent days. Both Jose Mourinho and Brendan Rodgers are looking to add to their squads during this transfer window, and the 18-year-old has emerged as a target for both The post Celtic need to hurry as rivals ready to ‘meet the price’ and seal signing appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Celtic 'occasion' turns into crucial Champions League clash after clubs told to 'enjoy' it
arts.sum: Joleon Lescott told Celtic and Aston Villa to ‘enjoy’ the clash Celtic and Aston Villa’s stars were told to “enjoy the occasion” when the two square off next week in Champions League action.

arts.ttl: Celtic can't rely on anyone else in Champions League as early results work against Hoops
arts.sum: Celtic know what they have to do this evening when Young Boys arrive at Parkhead in the Champions League. Of the other Champions League games Celtic need to watch out for, PSG and Manchester City square off in Paris with both sides just one and two points respectively behind.

arts.ttl: Kasper Schmeichel Celtic contract extension earns fan reaction, what goalkeeper said about deal
arts.sum: Kasper Schmeichel has put pen to paper on a Celtic contract extension, much to the delight of the fans. How fans have reacted to Kasper Schmeichel’s new Celtic deal

arts.ttl: Kasper Schmeichel extends his stay as Celtic's day of destiny arrives
arts.sum: Hamish and Ryan discuss the latest Celtic news and developments in Wednesday's edition of the morning briefing

arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours: Julio Enciso to Ipswich, Miguel Almiron to Atlanta United, Louie Barry to Celtic
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Julio Enciso to Ipswich Town and Miguel Almiron to Atlanta United.

arts.ttl: “I should’ve stayed” – Celtic exit is a nagging regret, ‘pure Scottish madness’ missed
arts.sum: Ramon Vega has admitted he should have never left Celtic, having missed the ‘pure Scottish madness’ ever since. Blick have an interview with the former Switzerland international today in which he admits he loved his time with Celtic. Vega spent six months on loan at Celtic from December 2000 to June 2001 in a temporary The post “I should’ve stayed” – Celtic exit is a nagging regret, ‘pure Scottish madness’ missed appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa fans all saying same thing before Celtic clash as Monaco Champions League defeat has them spooked
arts.sum: Aston Villa fans are scared to face Celtic in Champions League Aston Villa knew a win last night over AS Monaco would have put them in a strong position to make the Champions League knockout rounds.
